The subject should blend naturally into the crowd as if photographed by a professional sports photographer during a real game. Use realistic lighting, shallow depth of field, natural facial expressions, and documentary-style sports photography. The image should feel authentic, cinematic, highly detailed, and indistinguishable from a real photograph taken during an international football tournament.
